zh.lifeSummary: Jane Sounde於大約1380年出生在英國英格蘭。她於1418年與Thomas Noell De Hilcott結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jane Sounde于大约1380年出生在英国英格兰。她于1418年与Thomas Noell De Hilcott结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Sounde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Carsten, Erik, Johan, Lars, Morten, Per.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of twenty-five or more farmsteads, notably in western Norway, named with the dative singular of Old Norse sund ‘strait, sound’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: Jane Sounde was born about 1380, in England, United Kingdom. She married Thomas Noell De Hilcott in 1418. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Jane Sounde est née environ 1380, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Thomas Noell De Hilcott en 1418. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Jane Sounde wurde um 1380 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1418 Thomas Noell De Hilcott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Jane Sounde è nata il circa 1380 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Thomas Noell De Hilcott nel 1418. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Soundeは約1380年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。1418年にThomas Noell De Hilcottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Sounde(은)는 대략 1380년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1418년 Thomas Noell De Hilcott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jane Sounde nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Thomas Noell De Hilcott em 1418. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Jane Sounde родилась около 1380 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Noell De Hilcott в 1418 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Jane Sounde nació aproximadamente 1380, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Thomas Noell De Hilcott en 1418. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
